results.moreNote: {{n}} more {{unit}} not shown — narrow your criteria for more precise results
results.notInAnyProgram: This course is not in any indexed program's course list.
results.noCourses: No matching courses. Try rephrasing or loosening the criteria.

sim.dragFirst: Drag or click some courses in first, then auto-place
sim.unplacedNote: {{n}} course(s) could not fit (not enough semesters/cap), placed in Y1 to adjust
sim.searchProgramToStart: Search a program above to start.
sim.searchProgram: Search a program, e.g. Computer Science…

rules.anyCourseMax: Any course allowed, up to {{max}} units; not listed individually
rules.anyCourse: Any course allowed, not listed individually
rules.unattributed: {{n}} course(s) not counted under any rule: {{list}}
rules.dragHint: Drag to the right / click to auto-place
rules.jumpToCourse: Jump to a course: type a code or name…
rules.aiAdviceHint: Only recommends courses you can take
rules.goalPlaceholder: Describe your direction or goal, e.g. "I want to do AI and machine learning"
rules.unreachable: {{n}} more eligible course(s) have no offering/retrieval info and were left out; check the official course list.

timetable.title: Timetable
timetable.dropHere: Drop a course here, or click a course on the left to auto-place

cover.title: UQ Course Cover Maker
cover.subtitle: Course review / course combo → live preview → export a portrait image (1080×1440)
cover.quoteHint: 2–3 lines recommended, keep each line short
cover.comboCoursesPlaceholder: One per line: code + space + name
cover.comboCoursesHint: One per line, e.g. "INFS2200 Database Systems", 3–5 recommended
cover.paletteLabel: Palette (same layout, different color to tell subjects apart)
cover.photoHint: Use your own UQ photo (portrait works best). Processed on your device only, never uploaded to any server.
cover.previewNote: The preview is scaled down; the export is a 2160×2880 HD JPG (~0.5MB). Color and text changes update live.

default.name: Information Retrieval

and makes you truly understand IR and RAG
Great pick to get into IR ✅
